_purpose: Smoke-shape input fixture for the doe.tsir.real.lm_head_gemv kernel. The bootstrap oracle currently only supports fused_gemv at toy shape; this fixture exists so the canary can locate paired inputs by kernel name and produce a 'not_implemented' deferred receipt rather than FileNotFoundError. Real-shape dims are captured in runtime/zig/tests/tsir/real/lm_head_gemv/lm_head_gemv.notes.md (M=1, K=1152, N=262144 at Gemma 3 1B Q4K decode).
